response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s documenting the inauguration of the First National Silversmithing Exhibition, held in the halls of the Museum of Culture in Lima, with the presence of the President of the Republic and various prominent figures from our intellectual world. The following silversmithing displays are shown: primitive Inca silver objects, vases, candlesticks, monstrances, cutlery, and decorative objects of various styles and forms.
response.title: Primera Exposición Nacional de Platería
